name: Checkbox
description: Boolean checkbox with optional label + description. Composes Lucide Check icon as the checkmark glyph. Maps to shadcn/ui Checkbox.

$missingStates.$comment: Hover absent across all atoms (atom-batch pattern). Loading not applicable to Checkbox. Filled is Input-specific.

$missingIndeterminate.$comment: F14 candidate (NEW): Apollo v2 Checkbox lacks a Mixed/Indeterminate variant value on the Checked axis. WAI-ARIA convention (`aria-checked='mixed'`) for parent-of-partially-selected-children pattern unavailable. SP-11 candidate (tri-state semantics) not exercisable on this PoC.
$missingIndeterminate.$recommendation: Source-DS: add Checked=Mixed value, render with horizontal line glyph (Lucide Minus icon) replacing the Check glyph. Renderer maps to aria-checked='mixed'.

slots.name: box
slots.$role: The 16×16 square checkbox. Color + checkmark depend on Checked + State axes.
slots.$geometryNote: 16×16 hardcoded (no width/w-* or height/h-* tokens applied directly). Source-DS audit signal — could bind to {height.h-4}/{width.w-4}.
slots.radius: 4px raw — NOT bound to any token
slots.$radiusAuditFinding: F15 (NEW, MEDIUM): Checkbox box uses raw 4px corner radius. Apollo v2 has rounded-sm (6, added in Button KbdGroup backfill), rounded-md (8, in Checkbox tokens but UNUSED here), rounded-lg (10), rounded-full (9999). No token at 4px. Source-DS audit: add rounded-xs (4) OR rebind to rounded-sm (6) — minor visual change. Confusing that rounded-md exists in tokens but isn't applied.

slots.name: checkmark
slots.$role: Lucide Check icon glyph rendered inside the box when Checked=Yes. Stroke color = base/primary-foreground (white via currentColor).
slots.$confirmed: Walked cells 46:110 (Checked=Yes) shows Check icon as 14×14 absolute-centered child. Cell 46:111 (Checked=No) has no child — the icon literally disappears from the node tree when unchecked.

fill.$comment: Label color does not shift by state (Disabled relies on outer-container opacity to dim everything uniformly).

Yes.$confirmed: Walked 46:110 (Default), 18437:67522 (Pressed). Yes fill = primary or destructive on Invalid. State changes via opacity (Pressed=0.6) + ring (Focus) + border (Invalid), not fill.

box-opacity.$appliedAt: box (not outer container, unlike Switch/Input Disabled which apply to outer)
box-opacity.Disabled: $tbdStep3 (likely opacity-50 at outer container per Switch/Input pattern)
box-opacity.$pressedNote: F-pattern (cross-atom): Checkbox introduces opacity-60 at BOX level for Pressed. Differs from Switch+Input Disabled which apply opacity-50 at OUTER container. Two different opacity-application targets.
box-opacity.$confirmed: Walked 18437:67522 (Pressed) — opacity-60 applied to box element.

focus-ring.Invalid: $tbdStep3 — likely focus-destructive AT REST per F11 atom-batch pattern

Box.$role: Boxed layout — checkbox + label + description inside a bordered container. Similar to Switch Type=Box.
Box.$tbdStep3: Box-type cell not walked. Likely uses base/border + spacing/2-5 padding + rounded-md/lg radius per Switch Type=Box pattern.

touchTargetCompliance.$comment: Same compliance pattern as Switch — half the matrix passes WCAG 2.5.5.

quality.$note: Doc URL is clean — no fragment mismatch like Input F12 or Button.Link F3.

$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F14: NEW (MEDIUM). Checkbox lacks Mixed/Indeterminate state. WAI-ARIA aria-checked='mixed' cannot be represented. Source-DS: add Checked=Mixed value with horizontal-line glyph.
$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F15: NEW (MEDIUM). Checkbox box uses raw 4px corner radius. Apollo v2 has rounded-sm (6), rounded-md (8), rounded-lg (10), rounded-full (9999) but no token at 4px. Confusing — rounded-md is even DECLARED in tokens but unused. Source-DS: add rounded-xs (4) OR rebind.

$step2_known_gaps.resolution: OPEN — token exists in source but not observed in walked cells. Could be Box-type Disabled or Invalid-Pressed. Next walk.

$step2_known_gaps.field: Disabled state opacity application target (box vs outer container)
Invalid state full bindings (border, ring-at-rest, label color)

v0.3.0: SP-1 — whenVariant filter exercised on slots[checkmark] (only present when checked=Yes)
SP-4 — $bindingStatus: hardcoded fires on box corner radius (4px raw), box dimensions, container widths
SP-9 — N/A (Checkbox has no animation declared; check/uncheck is instant)
